title: Medications stopped during visit
description: Stopped-in-visit medications included cyanocobalamin, hydrocortisone formulations, lacosamide 100 mg, levetiracetam solution, and diazepam Valtoco 15 mg/2 spray.

title: Emergency visit for breakthrough seizure

title: CBC showed multiple hematologic abnormalities
description: CBC with differential finalized with values including WBC 7.0, hemoglobin 12.2 g/dL, hematocrit 36.1%, and platelets 309 x10^3/uL.
